arts.ttl: Friday’s briefing: Man Utd, Tottenham and Rangers into Europa League last 16
arts.sum: Chloe Kelly returned to Arsenal on loan from Manchester City.

arts.ttl: Dejan Kulusevksi delivers verdict on Daniel Levy chant and why Ange Postecoglou is the right man
arts.sum: Kulusevski was asked plenty of questions ahead of the game including about Ange Postecoglou's future, the lack of transfers this month, Lucas Bergvall's form and that chant from the Spurs fans that contains both his and the Tottenham chairman Daniel Levy's name. This is an important game and if we win we go to the next round so I think we can do good things in these last four months.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou’s verdict: “A night made in Tottenham”
arts.sum: It’s a great night for the club and all credit to all the Academy and the people who have worked with them. We tried to manage our players tonight knowing the week we’ve got coming up and that’s why we left him off for the first half.

arts.ttl: 'Spurs don't need to buy anyone - just play the kids'
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou says the 3-0 Europa League win over Elfsborg was "made in Tottenham" as youngsters Dane Scarlett, Damola Ajayi and Mikey Moore all score.

arts.ttl: Mikey Moore breaks 68-year-old record as Ange Postecoglou delivers Radu Dragusin injury update
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur's Mikey Moore breaks an all-time English goalscoring record held by Jimmy Greaves in Spurs' 3-0 Europa League win over Elfsborg.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace plot late move for 24 goals, 26 assists attacker – deal could impact Spurs financially
arts.sum: As the winter transfer window nears its deadline, Crystal Palace are actively exploring options to strengthen their squad, with Sporting CP winger Marcus Edwards emerging as a prime target. According to A Bola (via Sport Witness), Sporting CP are eager to part ways with Edwards following a string of disciplinary issues. arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou beams with pride as Europa League win is 'made in Tottenham' after next generation shine
arts.sum: Spurs beat Elfsborg on landmark night for three academy graduates

arts.ttl: Manchester United, Tottenham learn Europa League fates as four possible last-16 opponents revealed
arts.sum: Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur discover their four potential opponents for the last 16 of the Europa League after sealing top-eight finishes.

arts.ttl: Ange hails Spurs youngsters: 'Made in Tottenham'
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has branded his team's 3-0 win over Elfsborg as a night "made in Tottenham" after Spurs' young stars inspired the team to a vital 3-0 win in the Europa League on Thursday.

arts.ttl: It’s a night the academy should be proud of – Postecoglou hails Spurs’ young guns
arts.sum: Graduates Dane Scarlett, Damola Ajayi and Mikey Moore scored in a 3-0 Europa League win against Elfsborg.
